text: [{"success":true,"message":"Functional graph retrieved successfully","data":{"project":{"id":"1782495630510-fdlarlo","uuid":"9b021702-0353-4075-8dd8-c6a9c04e84da","name":"KCE_Demo_Rebuild"},"personas":[{"id":"6c36cf2b-8764-411a-bf90-87766a723b0d","persona":"User","outcomes":[{"id":"06dd9b83-3e48-46e8-9aa1-df7098e3acb1","outcome":"Manage Items","description":"Create, review, update completion status, and remove items stored in the backend database.","scenarios":[{"id":"2c8c0b6f-abfd-4ca2-ab60-5da801f775c2","scenario":"Add a new item","description":"User fills in a name and description in the creation form and submits. Both fields are trimmed and validated for non-empty content before the request is sent. On success the form clears and the item list refreshes.","steps":[{"id":"b23633ab-44a9-4410-b65a-a08b6881663b","order":1,"step":"Specify item details","actions":[{"id":"ec26b557-24ed-4e47-b7aa-74ef00b8b9d3","order":1,"action":"Provide item name","description":"label: Name; type: text; required: true; validation: must not be blank after trim","apis":[]},{"id":"ce6decfb-00f9-4d86-ab34-6ba849fe6699","order":2,"action":"Provide item description","description":"label: Description; type: text; required: true; validation: must not be blank after trim","apis":[]}]},{"id":"8e130c7d-63bf-4439-b441-84f926d46cf4","order":2,"step":"Submit the new item","actions":[{"id":"f8d03cf2-73a3-4d59-aa38-c1eeeeb201ce","order":1,"action":"Submit the new item","description":"Sends name and description as query parameters to create the item. Clears the form and refreshes the list on success.","apis":[{"id":"6fa70b78-b74f-4b54-9aeb-959c1bbfe04c","method":"POST","type":"REST","url":"/api/items?name={name}&description={description}","request":"query params: name, description (URL-encoded)","response":"created item object"}]}]}]},{"id":"f8faeba3-1af2-4e35-a1cc-453924664581","scenario":"Browse and monitor the item list","description":"On page load the app checks backend health (GET /) and fetches all items (GET /api/items). Items display name, description, and completion state. An empty state shows 'No items found.'","steps":[{"id":"a381fe11-2c77-4f74-948a-8c279103f5d0","order":1,"step":"Observe the application status","actions":[{"id":"b5beaa2e-53c7-4044-bce7-4484a3475f27","order":1,"action":"Observe the backend connection status","description":"Backend Status from GET / response; shows 'Loading...', then the backend message, or 'Error connecting to backend'.","apis":[]}]},{"id":"24491585-0fd0-4f3c-b66b-0070615b571c","order":2,"step":"Review items in the list","actions":[{"id":"e1448e6e-6ab8-4cf3-9a84-c886f712c832","order":1,"action":"Observe item name","description":"item.name in bold text.","apis":[]},{"id":"a855b30c-d6a1-4b58-a2b2-9b262e87dacc","order":2,"action":"Observe item description","description":"item.description as plain text.","apis":[]},{"id":"1fe01b1f-ca22-47b0-ba88-ea04f760b40c","order":3,"action":"Observe item completion state","description":"item.completed boolean; 'completed' CSS class applied when true.","apis":[]}]}]},{"id":"73b37d7d-3438-4768-a5bb-a44dfef96218","scenario":"Update an item's completion status","description":"User toggles completion status of a listed item. Active shows 'Complete', completed shows 'Undo'. Update is immediate and the list refreshes.","steps":[{"id":"ad5bcf3b-5284-401a-bd2b-45a958105c27","order":1,"step":"Indicate the desired completion state","actions":[{"id":"d89b48e0-6990-438a-bfdb-f6a24b1c5e3c","order":1,"action":"Indicate whether to mark the item as complete or incomplete","description":"'Complete' flags active item as done; 'Undo' reverts. Triggers immediate update.","apis":[]}]},{"id":"009b8870-454a-4afa-aff4-82083654dc41","order":2,"step":"Submit the completion status update","actions":[{"id":"592df047-5073-4074-a25e-912a29aefb45","order":1,"action":"Submit the completion status update","description":"Sends toggled completion boolean for the selected item. Refreshes list on success.","apis":[{"id":"bc9b6984-8f67-4d44-ac76-dce6fcbd2f38","method":"PUT","type":"REST","url":"/api/items/{id}?completed={completed}","request":"path param id (int); query param completed (bool)","response":"updated item object"}]}]}]},{"id":"ac100d0f-46c8-48ee-952f-1e3fd025021a","scenario":"Remove an item from the list","description":"User permanently removes a listed item. The list refreshes immediately after deletion.","steps":[{"id":"255b04d8-4c3f-41b5-a78f-c9e81cad303a","order":1,"step":"Remove the item","actions":[{"id":"3f948e0e-4031-4930-9dde-1963363c01e6","order":1,"action":"Delete the item","description":"Permanently removes the selected item by id. Refreshes list on success.","apis":[{"id":"1cdd8cc7-bbc5-4f10-b0e9-44c5ea2e9c0c","method":"DELETE","type":"REST","url":"/api/items/{id}","request":"path param id (int)","response":"deletion confirmation"}]}]}]}]}]},{"id":"cf3ed526-e0a6-4c20-8bc0-1c0e3a3f9b52","persona":"System","outcomes":[{"id":"70432abd-1ad4-4196-80d3-6aafc0c62550","outcome":"Monitor System Audit Activity","description":"Retrieve and expose audit log records that capture DML operations (INSERT, UPDATE, DELETE) on tracked tables via PostgreSQL triggers.","scenarios":[{"id":"58659d9f-076e-4d52-8a36-2f3ab0adb26f","scenario":"Retrieve audit log entries","description":"AuditService.get_audit_logs(limit) delegates to AuditRepository.get_logs(limit), querying audit_logs ordered by created_at desc, limit default 50. No auth guard. Rows serialized to AuditLogResponse.","steps":[{"id":"666f980b-5870-40fc-b933-40e10f5a581c","order":1,"step":"Receive request","actions":[{"id":"d9da0377-61b6-482f-800c-e530b8e057eb","order":1,"action":"Receive GET /api/audit","description":"Query param limit (int, optional, default 50). No auth. Session via Depends(get_db).","apis":[{"id":"efb063fa-8d48-44a6-84ff-ec5a2d68ff76","method":"GET","type":"REST","url":"/api/audit","request":"limit: int (optional, default=50)","response":"List[AuditLogResponse]"}]}]},{"id":"98028eb7-8fb9-41e9-b3c6-9d896db11e60","order":2,"step":"Query audit logs","actions":[{"id":"19dfca22-af19-41b8-9b67-311f9d2bb13e","order":1,"action":"Query audit log records","description":"AuditRepository.get_logs(limit) queries audit_logs ordered by created_at DESC up to limit.","apis":[]}]},{"id":"b1b31dc6-de17-4526-8397-e18483a0700d","order":3,"step":"Return response","actions":[{"id":"8d82c24e-3734-45d9-8b47-8b99c237939f","order":1,"action":"Serialize audit log response","description":"AuditLogResponse fields: id, table_name, action (INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE), record_id, created_at. from_attributes=True.","apis":[]}]}]}]},{"id":"ce3c7fe7-d223-4722-817f-0848f36e4b9a","outcome":"Manage Items","description":"Handle CRUD operations on the items collection, including deletion with existence validation and automatic audit-trail capture via a PostgreSQL trigger.","scenarios":[{"id":"bdb779c8-41d8-49a5-82ea-e7f9b944f2a4","scenario":"Create new item via POST API","description":"POST /api/items with name and description query params. ItemService.create_item -> ItemRepository.create builds Item (completed=False), db.add+commit+refresh. PostgreSQL trigger inserts into audit_logs. Returns ItemResponse.","steps":[{"id":"984aa53f-24a1-4126-97d6-6ae32653a685","order":1,"step":"Receive item creation request","actions":[{"id":"3d77132b-9978-4570-b019-eaa9bf026a3f","order":1,"action":"Receive POST /api/items","description":"Query params name (str, required), description (str, required). Session via get_db. Response model ItemResponse.","apis":[{"id":"d07088a9-cc23-480c-ac64-efa74b13d376","method":"POST","type":"REST","url":"/api/items","request":"name: str (query, required); description: str (query, required)","response":"ItemResponse{id,name,description,completed,created_at,updated_at}"}]}]},{"id":"ebfd26e4-70a2-49ad-b47e-30d2ab91f758","order":2,"step":"Validate input parameters","actions":[{"id":"c552417f-155d-48c1-a8bc-41ee0cd867b8","order":1,"action":"Validate name parameter","description":"name: str required query param; FastAPI enforces presence and type; no length/format constraints.","apis":[]},{"id":"1513846e-dff1-4cad-a490-a029b796c678","order":2,"action":"Validate description parameter","description":"description: str required query param; FastAPI enforces presence and type; no constraints.","apis":[]}]},{"id":"b91a8195-cf91-404f-814a-dc0aded616c2","order":3,"step":"Persist item and record audit trail","actions":[{"id":"512371fc-d498-4763-8d80-e75ba79ee1c3","order":1,"action":"Persist new item to items table","description":"ItemRepository.create -> Item(name,description,completed=False); db.add+commit+refresh. Indexes ix_items_name_desc, ix_item_status_time.","apis":[]},{"id":"1b4e3aed-c16d-48a3-9771-11a6c78d1555","order":2,"action":"Insert audit log entry for item creation","description":"PostgreSQL trigger audit_trigger_func fires AFTER INSERT on items; inserts audit_logs (action='INSERT', record_id=NEW.id).","apis":[]},{"id":"66f6b02e-c02d-48d7-ae5a-c632712c192b","order":3,"action":"Return ItemResponse to caller","description":"Serializes refreshed Item to ItemResponse (completed always False on creation).","apis":[]}]}]},{"id":"21439f78-034a-4fc6-9214-6983e13f67be","scenario":"Retrieve paginated item list","description":"GET /api/items with optional skip (0) and limit (100). ItemService.get_items -> ItemRepository.get_all queries items with offset/limit. No auth. Returns List[ItemResponse].","steps":[{"id":"17a28d39-7321-405b-b9f1-8afe44284714","order":1,"step":"Receive paginated item request","actions":[{"id":"dd015323-87b7-4fda-b154-5467a426136a","order":1,"action":"Receive GET /api/items","description":"Query params skip (int, default 0), limit (int, default 100). No auth. Response List[ItemResponse].","apis":[{"id":"2fddf4ea-8ba2-43f1-b76f-bf5c9ad9c8dc","method":"GET","type":"REST","url":"/api/items","request":"skip: int = 0, limit: int = 100","response":"List[ItemResponse]"}]}]},{"id":"478cba43-d90b-4adc-8bd0-5522c9b3b5e0","order":2,"step":"Query items from database","actions":[{"id":"273cd52e-0223-489c-a672-ee80650155a2","order":1,"action":"Query items","description":"ItemRepository.get_all -> db.query(Item).offset(skip).limit(limit).all().","apis":[]}]},{"id":"0c5b507e-483d-45cd-b6f1-364ac08b2e03","order":3,"step":"Serialize and return response","actions":[{"id":"660dbd98-d64a-4f24-9269-e9c12bfc3821","order":1,"action":"Return item list","description":"FastAPI serializes ORM Items to List[ItemResponse]. from_attributes=True.","apis":[]}]}]},{"id":"9f791e7e-0c69-4ff6-936e-4f14b24a86ad","scenario":"Update an item's completion status","description":"PUT /api/items/{item_id} with completed (bool). Fetches item; 404 if absent. update_status sets completed, commit+refresh. PostgreSQL trigger logs UPDATE. Returns ItemResponse.","steps":[{"id":"26c986ea-5888-4a8a-b6ae-5d6088869e65","order":1,"step":"Receive update request","actions":[{"id":"8ad5ca40-f9d8-4797-93f4-9d21368b394c","order":1,"action":"Receive PUT /api/items/{item_id}","description":"Path item_id (int, required); query completed (bool, required). No auth. Response ItemResponse.","apis":[{"id":"ab77c160-ca9d-49a5-8eb2-3c836022bb26","method":"PUT","type":"REST","url":"/api/items/{item_id}","request":"item_id: int (path); completed: bool (query)","response":"ItemResponse{id,name,description,completed,created_at,updated_at}"}]}]},{"id":"8d929573-1e85-4ca1-a9c1-1e81af05da71","order":2,"step":"Validate item existence","actions":[{"id":"a6c9cd31-c487-461b-bf2c-45144a3d4da7","order":1,"action":"Query item by ID","description":"ItemRepository.get_by_id -> SELECT FROM items WHERE id=item_id; None if absent.","apis":[]},{"id":"530ea2d9-39ef-4fd1-af16-aa3b96eb8772","order":2,"action":"Reject missing item","description":"Raises HTTPException 404 'Item not found' if absent.","apis":[]}]},{"id":"d5747ee7-f41e-41b5-ae8b-1e7bfd357020","order":3,"step":"Persist completion status update","actions":[{"id":"91b00087-f45b-4eca-9d9b-b0d9f88e39e7","order":1,"action":"Update item completion status","description":"update_status sets completed, commit+refresh -> UPDATE items. PostgreSQL trigger logs UPDATE into audit_logs.","apis":[]}]},{"id":"a3355e42-960e-44b8-969f-7c5bb4fa0e40","order":4,"step":"Return response","actions":[{"id":"15972f0a-f9f2-40d8-88af-48f4cac58710","order":1,"action":"Return updated item","description":"Returns ItemResponse; db.refresh ensures updated_at reflects commit.","apis":[]}]}]},{"id":"bfd32886-ea90-4879-9674-80b5d921eb89","scenario":"Delete item by ID with existence validation","description":"DELETE /api/items/{item_id}. Queries item; 404 if absent. Else db.delete+commit. PostgreSQL trigger logs DELETE. Returns 200 {status: ok}.","steps":[{"id":"f47d85e8-980c-467b-80f2-eb64a240f7af","order":1,"step":"Receive delete request","actions":[{"id":"1bd0a371-a8be-43e3-907f-2e026b868e40","order":1,"action":"Receive DELETE /api/items/{item_id}","description":"Path item_id (int, required). No body. No auth. Returns 200 {status: ok}.","apis":[{"id":"c50d76ac-a738-4952-903e-a56afb46e394","method":"DELETE","type":"REST","url":"/api/items/{item_id}","request":"item_id: int (path, required)","response":"{status: ok}"}]}]},{"id":"5604cee3-3d7f-473e-ad25-224c6cc453cb","order":2,"step":"Validate item existence","actions":[{"id":"21fd4744-f616-4882-a061-f6dcb3162f77","order":1,"action":"Query item by ID","description":"ItemRepository.get_by_id -> SELECT FROM items WHERE id=item_id; Item or None.","apis":[]},{"id":"eb3f8c3b-b536-45c0-a9c2-dcbe6feec5ef","order":2,"action":"Reject missing item","description":"Raises HTTPException 404 'Item not found'; halts without delete.","apis":[]}]},{"id":"aa4cd074-6888-4cfd-99e3-3517838fdca8","order":3,"step":"Delete item record","actions":[{"id":"fee7b37f-f036-4031-89c6-d8fb6ef35ce2","order":1,"action":"Delete item from items table","description":"ItemRepository.delete -> db.delete(item)+commit; removes the row.","apis":[]},{"id":"a3ac506b-ccdf-4082-b110-296b24cf5107","order":2,"action":"Insert audit log entry via database trigger","description":"PostgreSQL trigger fires AFTER DELETE on items; inserts audit_logs (action='DELETE', record_id=OLD.id).","apis":[]}]},{"id":"2bfd04e4-192b-4474-bdf4-2f07c08e23e7","order":4,"step":"Return success response","actions":[{"id":"b2599145-dbf6-4eca-a828-b4a5f7a74294","order":1,"action":"Return deletion confirmation","description":"Returns HTTP 200 {status: ok}. No response_model declared.","apis":[]}]}]}]},{"id":"e6449cb3-57d5-4e9b-8b3d-90a44a25b527","outcome":"Monitor System Health","description":"Expose a lightweight health probe confirming the backend API process is running and responsive.","scenarios":[{"id":"d9e1abf0-bc59-45a5-a16b-3e80ea8a6422","scenario":"Respond to backend health check request","description":"GET / with no params, no auth, no dependencies. Returns {status: ok, message: 'Backend API is running!'} HTTP 200. No branches. Handler read_root() in routes.py.","steps":[{"id":"f7a21a52-d7b5-4575-8910-87b726f67585","order":1,"step":"Receive health check request","actions":[{"id":"0aff0726-4f86-4aa2-8acb-18b26f89cf55","order":1,"action":"Receive GET /","description":"GET / no params, no body, no auth. Handler read_root() in routes.py. Router mounted at root.","apis":[{"id":"d744a464-7f68-4a99-bbc0-4d32fddee1af","method":"GET","type":"REST","url":"/","request":"none","response":"{status: ok, message: Backend API is running!}"}]}]},{"id":"ae4edbb7-5a10-445e-b239-31520feed2f0","order":2,"step":"Return health status","actions":[{"id":"6f7e1de5-7db9-4b60-af6b-c270ebbad279","order":1,"action":"Return health status response","description":"Returns static JSON {status: ok, message: Backend API is running!} HTTP 200. Single unconditional return.","apis":[]}]}]}]}]}],"summary":{"totalPersonas":2,"totalOutcomes":4,"totalScenarios":10,"totalSteps":26,"totalActions":35,"totalApis":9}}}]
